# Launch Checklist

- [ ] Verify README messaging and command examples
- [ ] Verify docs index and page links
- [ ] Validate sample commands on `examples/*/repo`
- [ ] Refresh `examples/sample-outputs/*`
- [ ] Run test suite
- [ ] Validate strict policy behavior (`--strict`, `--policy`)
- [ ] Validate GitHub Action workflow and artifact upload
- [ ] Prepare issue labels: `good first issue`, `roadmap`, `docs`, `core`, `ci`
- [ ] Open and assign all launch backlog issues
- [ ] Capture and commit launch screenshots/GIFs
